title: Seed Bags Modded Compat
description: Turn seeds into seed bags but modded edition!
body: **![Title](https://i.imgur.com/qS1Np0X.png)** ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/928059199550783548?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=228B22&link=https://discord.gg/bv6EDJEB4R) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1431825?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=ffffff&color=228b22&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Ftexture-packs%2Fseed-bags-modded-compat%2Ffiles%2Fall) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/iSmYUo5V?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=ffffff&color=228B22&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fresourcepack%2Fseed-bags-modded-compat%2Fversions) *** ### **Seed Bags Modded Compat** This is an addon resource pack for Vanilla Seed Bags by coolbot100s! Vanilla Seed Bags is REQUIRED This pack retextures various modded crops and seeds for a more aesthetic, and less messy inventory. Put those seeds in a pouch where they belong! _\*Please note this pack was originally made for 1.20.1. If mods have added new crops for newer versions, please let me know so I can update it!_ ### **Currently Supported:** * [\[Let's Do\] Farm and Charm]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lets-do-farm-charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-farm-charm)) * [\[Let's Do\] Nether Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-nethervinery) * [\[Let's Do\] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery) * [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) * [Cultural Delights](https://modrinth.com/mod/cultural-delights) * [Delightful](https://modrinth.com/mod/delightful) * [Fish of Thieves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves) * [Fruits Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/fruits-delight) * [Miner's Delight +](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight) * [Simply Cats](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-cats) * [Veggies Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/veggies-delight) * [Vintage Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/vintage-delight) * Minecraft (Added Torchflower and Pitcher Plant) ### **FAQ** **Does this work for version x?** Likely! This was made for 1.20.1 for a specific modpack (Shielded) but if it isn't working on another version, please let me know! **Will you add support for mod x?** I'd love to! These were just the mods I am using in my modpack but if you have a request, feel free to leave a comment! **It's missing crop x!** Oh no! That's probably not intentional. Please leave a comment so I can get it fixed!
